revision.comment: Link targets updated or created per [[Wikipedia:Redirect#Bypass_redirects_in_navigational_templates|BRINT]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Lead too short}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Lead too short | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = content | image = [[File:Wiki letter w.svg|40px]] | class = ambox-lead_too_short | issue = This article's [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lead section#Length|lead section]] '''may be too short to adequately [[Wikipedia:summary style|summarize]] the key points'''. | fix = Please consider expanding the lead to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lead section#Provide an accessible overview|provide an accessible overview]] of all important aspects of the article. {{#if:{{{reason|}}}|The reason given is: '''{{{reason}}}'''}} | cat = Wikipedia introduction cleanup | all = All pages needing cleanup | cat2 = Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify | all2 = All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify | date = {{{date|}}} | talk = {{{talk|}}} }}<!--{{Lead too short}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis in Wikidata, not here! --> </noinclude>
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Lead too short]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
